content:
You can see all the main keyboard bindings with Super + K.

Super + Shift + 1/2/3/4

Super + Shift + Alt + Arrows

Super + Shift + Arrow

Super + Shift + Equal

Super + Shift + Minus

Super + Alt + 1/2/3/4

Super + Ctrl + Alt + Z

Super + Shift + Return

Super + Shift + Alt + B

Super + Shift + Alt + F

Super + Shift + Alt + G

Super + Shift + Ctrl + G

Change/add bindings in ~/.config/hypr/bindings.conf.

~/.config/hypr/bindings.conf

Usually on Linux, you need Ctrl + Shift + C/V to copy'n'paste in the terminal and Ctrl + C/V to do it everywhere else. These Omarchy unified clipboard hotkeys work everywhere (except the file manager).

With screenrecordings, hit the hotkey to start, hit it again to stop.

All capture options are also accessible under Capture in the Omarchy menu (Super + Alt + Space).

Super + Ctrl + Shift + Space

Super + Ctrl + Backspace

Extra background images live in ~/.config/omarchy/current/backgrounds. Also available via Install > Background in the Omarchy menu.

~/.config/omarchy/current/backgrounds

All style options are also accessible under Style in the Omarchy menu (Super + Alt + Space).

Super + Shift + Space

The prefix key is Ctrl + Space (Ctrl + B also works). You can change these bindings in ~/.config/tmux/tmux.conf.

~/.config/tmux/tmux.conf

Ctrl + Alt + Shift + Arrows

Alt + Arrow Left/Right

These functions must be run inside a Tmux session.

tdl <ai> [<second_ai>]

tdlm <ai> [<second_ai>]

tsl <count> <command>

Ghostty terminal is installed using Install > Terminal via the Omarchy menu.

Super + Ctrl + Shift + Arrows

Super + Ctrl + Shift + Alt + Arrows

Ctrl + Shift + Arrows

Apple displays have their own brightness control via asdcontrol:

Ctrl + Left/right arrow

See all the Neovim hotkeys configured by LazyVim.

You can use Super + Ctrl + E to show a complete emoji picker that'll put the selection on the clipboard or you can use these quick access options.

You can add more of your own by editing ~/.XCompose, then running omarchy-restart-xcompose in the terminal to get the changes picked up.

omarchy-restart-xcompose
